entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: 用 AI 与历史人物对话是一种专注的 AI 学习方式，避免被动收集答案。这个模式围绕一个具体任务构建：进入与历史人物的对话。提问、挑战想法，并通过他们所处时代、价值观和限制来聆听世界。

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI: practical guide
entries.value: 用 AI 与历史人物对话：实用指南

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: 与历史人物对话不是通往过去的魔法入口。它是一种学习形式。

entries.source: Teachers

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: 在正式推出前，教师和领导者可以从学习任何事物、苏格拉底式教学、作业辅导教练、测验和闪卡开始。

entries.source: Teachers need more than a generic chatbot. They need predictable learning behaviors: ask questions, check reasoning, generate practice, preserve student voice, and make misconceptions visible.
entries.value: 教师需要的不只是通用聊天机器人。他们需要可预测的学习行为：提问、检查推理、生成练习、保留学生声音，并让误解显现。

entries.source: Teachers or parents evaluating focused AI learning behaviors before a school deployment.
entries.value: 在学校部署前评估聚焦 AI 学习行为的教师或家长。

entries.source: Technical story
entries.value: 技术故事

entries.source: Tell a scene, pause for prediction or reflection, and connect back to the concept.
entries.value: 讲述一个场景，暂停让学习者预测或反思，然后连接回概念。

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: 告诉该模式你想学习或产出什么。

entries.source: Ten focused questions give immediate feedback and a simple review path.
entries.value: 十个聚焦问题提供即时反馈和简单复习路径。

entries.source: Thank you for choosing to be part of our community at Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ), doing business as inspir ("inspir", "we", "us", "our"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy notice or our practices concerning your personal information, please contact us at support@inspir.app. When you visit our website https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app, use our mobile applications, as the case may be (the "App") and more generally, use any of our services (the "Services", which include the Website and App), we appreciate that you are trusting us with your personal information. We take your privacy very seriously. In this privacy notice, we seek to explain to you in the clearest way possible what information we collect, how we use it and what rights you have in relation to it. We hope you take some time to read through it carefully, as it is important. If there are any terms in this privacy notice that you disagree with, please discontinue the use of our Services immediately. This privacy notice applies to all information collected through our Services (which, as described above, includes our Website and App), as well as, any related services, sales, marketing or events. Please read this privacy notice carefully as it will help you understand what we do with the information that we collect. Our Terms and Conditions govern all use of our Service and together with the Privacy Policy constitute your agreement with us (“Agreement”).
entries.value: 感谢你选择加入 Great Indian Company（Holding Partnership Firm，GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ）的社区，该公司以 inspir（“inspir”、“我们”）名义开展业务。我们致力于保护你的个人信息和隐私权。如果你对本隐私通知或我们关于你个人信息的做法有任何问题或疑虑，请通过 support@inspir.app 联系我们。当你访问我们的网站 https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app、使用我们的移动应用（视情况而定称为“应用”），以及更一般地使用我们的任何服务（“服务”，包括网站和应用）时，我们感谢你将个人信息托付给我们。我们非常重视你的隐私。在本隐私通知中，我们力求以尽可能清晰的方式向你解释我们收集哪些信息、如何使用这些信息，以及你享有哪些相关权利。我们希望你花时间仔细阅读，因为这很重要。如果你不同意本隐私通知中的任何条款，请立即停止使用我们的服务。本隐私通知适用于通过我们的服务（如上所述，包括我们的网站和应用）收集的所有信息，以及任何相关服务、销售、营销或活动。请仔细阅读本隐私通知，因为它将帮助你理解我们如何处理所收集的信息。我们的条款和条件管辖你对我们服务的所有使用，并与隐私政策共同构成你与我们的协议（“协议”）。

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: 这种组合比任一单独层次更有用。普通百科摘要可能容易忘记。纯角色扮演可能误导。声音加证据创造了更好的学习界面。

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: 这种差异会体现在流程中。最好的会话不是一个巨大回答，而是一个循环：设定目标、尝试、获得反馈、修复薄弱点，并选择下一步行动。

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: 这不会取代教师、社区、书籍或学校。它给学习者另一条进入路径。它可以帮助学生开始作业，帮助家长解释概念，帮助自学构建者学习代码，或帮助好奇者追随一个本可能消失的问题。

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: 最终回顾很重要。当你复述这个想法时，你会看出哪些已经扎实，哪些仍然是从 AI 那里借来的。

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: 这个焦点很重要。通用聊天机器人几乎可以回答任何问题，但学习模式会给对话一个形状。它会把你推向能让想法留下来的思考、练习、反馈或探索方式。

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: 这个差距正是 AI 学习伙伴重要的原因。好的伙伴不只是回答问题。它会帮助学习者选择起点，用通俗语言解释想法，检查是否理解，并在第一次解释没有奏效时继续推进。

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: 这个提示帮助学习者开始，同时不拿走记忆这一行为。inspir 的闪卡制作工具就是为这种“先尝试、再揭示、诚实评分、尽早带回薄弱卡片”的循环而设计的。

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: 这是一个警告信号。识别不是回忆。读懂清晰解释，不等于能解一道新题、写一段文字，或在压力下回答问题。

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: 这对作业尤其重要。有用的问题不是“AI 能生成答案吗？”通常能。有用的问题是“AI 能帮助学习者理解通向答案的路径吗？”这就是“用 AI 学习而不欺骗自己”指南关注提示、检查和迁移练习的原因。

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: 这就是 inspir 处理历史对话的方式：人物卡、角色内回复，以及让想象与证据保持连接的背景笔记。

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: 这就是 inspir 追求的标准：让任何有好奇心和互联网连接的人都能获得可及、个性化、有趣且有用的学习。

entries.source: That is the strength of Socratic learning. Instead of handing over the full answer immediately, the tutor asks a focused question. The learner makes a guess. The tutor tests that guess, offers a hint, and helps the learner notice what changed.
entries.value: 这就是苏格拉底式学习的力量。导师不会立即交出完整答案，而是提出一个聚焦问题。学习者做出猜测。导师测试这个猜测，提供提示，并帮助学习者注意发生了什么变化。

entries.source: That is what inspir's Socratic Instruction mode is built for: one question at a time, with hints before answers and synthesis after genuine thinking.
entries.value: 这正是 inspir 的苏格拉底式教学模式所服务的目标：一次一个问题，答案前先给提示，真正思考后再综合。

entries.source: That is why a Socratic AI tutor can feel slower at first and more powerful later. It trades the comfort of a finished explanation for the evidence that the learner is actually building the idea.
entries.value: 这就是为什么苏格拉底式 AI 导师一开始可能感觉更慢，后来却更强大。它用“学习者确实在构建想法”的证据，换取放弃完整解释带来的舒适感。

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: 这就是主动回忆重要的原因。你不是看答案，而是尝试从记忆中取出它。这种努力会强化记忆，并暴露仍需努力的部分。

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: 这就是 inspir 把学习任务分成公开模式的原因。如果你想要温和解释，从学习任何事物开始。如果你想推理一个概念而不是听讲，用苏格拉底式教学。如果你卡在作业上，作业辅导教练比通用答案引擎更合适。形式应该服务于学习任务。

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: 这种提问会把历史从列表变成背景。

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: 这种循环贯穿整个平台。数学步骤教练把问题拆成步骤。闪卡制作工具把笔记变成回忆练习。趣味知识测验加入经压力测试的提取。写作教练帮助改进草稿而不替代作者。

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: 这个循环比复制慢，但比一直困惑快得多。

entries.source: That rhythm is especially useful for abstract topics: opportunity cost, causation in history, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, and argument structure. It can also support practical work. A learner can use Debate Any Topic after a Socratic session to test whether their reasoning survives pressure.
entries.value: 这种节奏对抽象主题尤其有用：机会成本、历史因果、文学解读、伦理取舍、证明、概率和论证结构。它也能支持实用工作。学习者可以在苏格拉底式会话后使用辩论任何话题，测试自己的推理是否经得住压力。

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: AI 应区分人物和证据。它可以用有历史根据的声音回答，但也应在记录不完整、解释存在分歧或回答属于重构时加入笔记。

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: 应用围绕苏格拉底式提问、作业提示、测验、闪卡、角色扮演和规划等教学行为组织。

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: 本应用将角色扮演对话与关于记录和不确定性的简短背景说明区分开来。

entries.source: The article is only the starting point. These public routes connect the idea to a live mode, subject hub, study path, or workflow.
entries.value: 文章只是起点。这些公开路线把想法连接到实时模式、学科中心、学习路径或工作流。

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: 受众页面会明确预期学习行为，让第一次会话以更好的判断开始。

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: 此中心旨在回答的受众搜索。

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: 最好的 AI 学习会话不是一个长答案。它们更像一个循环：

entries.source: The best homework help reduces friction without removing the student's responsibility to reason, explain, and revise.
entries.value: 最好的作业帮助会减少阻力，同时不移除学生推理、解释和修订的责任。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。卡片一次只问一件事，并包含陷阱，让复习建立理解，而不只是识别。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。inspir 不会扔下一个长答案，而是帮助你选择更简单的基础、更深入的路线或一个实用例子。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。应用会把角色内对话与关于记录和不确定性的简短背景笔记分开。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。教练会给出有针对性的修订重点和前后对照示例，而不替代你的声音。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。教练一次提出一个有力反驳，并跟踪重要主张。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。教练支持你的思考而不接管作业，因此最终作品仍然属于你。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。辩论使用公开风格和世界观，但不假装知道私人信念。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。流程会检查每一步、指出小错误，并把步骤连接回概念。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。旅程始终锚定在状态和证据上：什么已知、什么是重构、什么是推测，以及你的身份现实中能接触到什么。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。规划器会优先处理薄弱领域、加入复习循环，并为错过的日子创建备用计划。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。测验模式会在你回答前隐藏答案，然后把每个错漏变成复习点。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。导师一次问一个问题，等待你的推理，并只在你尝试后进行综合。

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: 最好的学习会话是可调整的。导师会问你预期代码会做什么，然后用小例子和测试让行为变得清楚。

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: 最好的结果不是完美答案，而是学习者说出“我觉得我现在懂了，让我试试”的那一刻。

entries.source: The better use is feedback, structure, evidence checks, and revision coaching. You can ask it to preserve your voice and avoid replacing the work.
entries.value: 更好的用法是反馈、结构、证据检查和修订辅导。你可以要求它保留你的声音，并避免替代你的作品。

entries.source: The blog connects useful learning advice to live practice, so a guide can become a study session in one step.
entries.value: 博客把有用的学习建议连接到实时练习，因此一篇指南可以一步变成一次学习会话。

entries.source: The blog is organized around pillar clusters, category hubs, related modes, prompt routes, structured data, and an AI-readable index so each guide can be understood and recommended in context.
entries.value: 博客围绕支柱主题群、分类中心、相关模式、提示路线、结构化数据和 AI 可读索引组织，让每篇指南都能在上下文中被理解和推荐。

entries.source: The blog is organized around study methods, prompt loops, and the public AI learning modes people can use immediately.
entries.value: 博客围绕学习方法、提示词循环和人们可以立即使用的公开 AI 学习模式组织。

entries.source: The blog should not be a dead end. Every cluster is designed to move a learner from advice into a mode, prompt loop, quiz, flashcard set, or revision habit.
entries.value: 博客不应成为死胡同。每个主题群都旨在把学习者从建议带入模式、提示词循环、测验、闪卡组或修订习惯。

entries.source: The blog supports the path with prompts, study strategy, and examples that link back into live modes.
entries.value: 博客通过提示词、学习策略和示例支持这条路径，并链接回实时模式。

entries.source: The broader open-source inspir platform.
entries.value: 更广泛的开源 inspir 平台。

entries.source: The builder balances ambition with review, practice, recovery days, and the next smallest useful action.
entries.value: 该生成器在雄心壮志与复习、练习、休息日以及下一步最微小且有用的行动之间取得了平衡。

entries.source: The categories of personal information we have collected about you. he categories of sources from which we collect your personal information. The business or commercial purpose for collecting or selling your personal information. The categories of third parties with whom we share personal information. The specific pieces of personal information we have collected about you. A list of categories of personal information that we have sold, along with the category of any other company we sold it to. If we have not sold your personal information, we will inform you of that fact. A list of categories of personal information that we have disclosed for a business purpose, along with the category of any other company we shared it with. Please note, you are entitled to ask us to provide you with this information up to two times in a rolling twelve-month period. When you make this request, the information provided may be limited to the personal information we collected about you in the previous 12 months.
entries.value: 我们收集的关于你的个人信息类别。我们收集你个人信息的来源类别。收集或出售你个人信息的商业或业务目的。我们共享个人信息的第三方类别。我们收集的关于你的具体个人信息。我们已出售的个人信息类别列表，以及出售给的其他公司类别。如果我们没有出售你的个人信息，我们会告知你这一事实。我们为业务目的披露的个人信息类别列表，以及共享给的其他公司类别。请注意，你有权在滚动十二个月期间最多两次要求我们提供这些信息。当你提出该请求时，所提供的信息可能仅限于我们在过去 12 个月内收集的关于你的个人信息。

entries.source: The closing beat returns to the mission: public access, schools, and a more open way to learn.
entries.value: 结尾回到使命：公共可及、学校，以及一种更开放的学习方式。

entries.source: The coach checks each move, names the rule, and repairs slips before moving forward.
entries.value: 教练会检查每个动作、命名规则，并在前进前修复小错误。

entries.source: The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: 教练提供有针对性的修改优先级和修改前后的示例，而不会取代您的个人风格。

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: 教练会一次提出一个强有力的反驳观点，并追踪关键论点。

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: 教练会辅助你的思考，而不会直接代劳，确保最终的作业成果仍由你完成。

entries.source: The coach turns misses and hesitation into a review schedule rather than another passive summary.
entries.value: 教练会将你的遗漏和犹豫转化为复习计划，而不是提供又一个被动的总结。

entries.source: The coding route connects code tutoring, project coaching, data interpretation, research, and concept mapping so learning happens through small testable steps.
entries.value: 编程路线连接代码辅导、项目教练、数据解读、研究和概念图，让学习通过小而可测试的步骤发生。

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: 共同想法很简单：让学习者保持主动。AI 应该让思考更容易开始，而不是让思考变得不必要。

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: 社区通过学校、大学、竞赛、课外项目和学习者社区扩展。

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: 此中心旨在回答的比较搜索。

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: 复制陷阱很微妙。它不总是感觉像作弊，有时感觉像高效率。AI 把某件事解释得很漂亮，你点头，然后继续往下。十分钟后，如果答案不在眼前，你就无法复现这个想法。

entries.source: The current inspirlearning.com rebuild.
entries.value: 当前的 inspirlearning.com 重建项目。

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: 辩论过程运用了人物的公开风格和世界观，且不会假装了解其私人信仰。

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: 差别在于你如何使用它。

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: AI 导师最简单的版本是一个给出漂亮答案的框。有时这有用，但还不够。只接收答案的学习者，可能页面完成了，技能却没有变化。

entries.source: The exam route links planning, quizzes, flashcards, spaced review, and motivation so learners do not confuse rereading with readiness.
entries.value: 考试路线连接规划、测验、闪卡、间隔复习和动力，让学习者不把重读误认为准备充分。

entries.source: The fastest route from search intent to learning action.
entries.value: 从搜索意图到学习行动的最快路线。

entries.source: The fastest way back is to start a public learning mode, browse the mode directory, or read a guide that links into the live chat experience.
entries.value: 最快回到学习的方法，是启动一个公开学习模式、浏览模式目录，或阅读一篇链接到实时聊天体验的指南。

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Art Appreciation Guide is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: 从艺术鉴赏指南获得价值最快的方法，是给 AI 一个学习任务，而不只是一个主题。主题说明你感兴趣的内容；学习任务说明你需要哪种帮助。

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Career Explorer is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: 从职业探索获得价值最快的方法，是给 AI 一个学习任务，而不只是一个主题。主题说明你感兴趣的内容；学习任务说明你需要哪种帮助。

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Case Study Simulator is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: 从案例研究模拟器获得价值最快的方法，是给 AI 一个学习任务，而不只是一个主题。主题说明你感兴趣的内容；学习任务说明你需要哪种帮助。
